description: Inventory all Bridge Command training scenarios located in '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/' and create a digital preservation catalog. Create a JSON catalog file at '/home/ga/Documents/scenario_catalog.json' consisting of a JSON array where each object represents a scenario directory and contains: 'scenario_name' (directory name), 'directory_path' (full path), 'world_model' (from environment.ini 'Setting'), 'start_time' (from environment.ini 'StartTime'), 'own_ship_name' (from ownship.ini 'ShipName'), 'traffic_vessel_count' (count of 'Type(x)' indices in othership.ini), 'files_present' (list of filenames), and 'is_complete' (boolean, true if environment.ini, ownship.ini, and othership.ini all exist). Generate SHA-256 checksums for every file in every scenario directory and save to '/home/ga/Documents/scenario_checksums.sha256' in standard format using absolute paths. Write a 'Preservation Assessment Report' to '/home/ga/Documents/preservation_report.txt' including the total count of scenarios, a count of complete vs incomplete scenarios, and a list of all unique World Models found.
